creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174155
patch

Tested with Poudriere on 10.3.
According to RH release notes https://rhn.redhat.com/errata/RHBA-2016-1663.html :
* Due to invalid packets on the network generated by non-compliant mDNS
implementations, the avahi-daemon service generated "Invalid response packet
from host" log messages for every invalid response packet. A patch has been
applied to prevent avahi-daemon from generating log messages with regard to
invalid DNS packets. As a result, log files no longer contain the described log
messages. (BZ#1357125)
